title: rubus acerispinus
intro: Rubus acerispinus, also known as the "fairy thimbleberry," is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Rubus acerispinus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus acerispinus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
